text: Scarlett Thomas paused for a moment, surveying the scene before Scarlett Thomas. Scarlett Thomas watched as Kali Newcomb attempted to explain the nuances of a particularly pungent sour beer to Ronan Francois, who was clearly more interested in the free pretzels than the lecture on lactobacillus fermentation. Suddenly, a commotion erupted near the IPA section.
context: Scarlett Thomas, the organizer of homebrewing workshops at a craft beer festival, navigates the crowded and chaotic event.
